column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Set Method to GET
3. URL: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/ping
4. Click Send
column8:
Status Code: 201 Created
Response Body: Created
Response Time: < 500ms

column4: Send POST request to /auth with valid credentials
column7:
1. URL: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth
2. Body: {"username":"admin","password":"password123"}
3. Headers: Content-Type: application/json
4. Send
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Response Body contains 'token'
Response Time: < 700ms

column4: Send POST to /auth with incorrect password
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Response Body: {"reason":"Bad credentials"}

column4: POST to /booking with full valid JSON
column7:
1. URL: /booking
2. Body: {"firstname":"Jim","lastname":"Brown","totalprice":111,"depositpaid":true,"bookingdates":{"checkin":"2018-01-01","checkout":"2019-01-01"},"additionalneeds":"Breakfast"}
3. Headers: Content-Type: application/json, Accept: application/json
4. Send
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Response Body: Contains bookingid and nested booking object
Header: Content-Type: application/json

column5: Returns array of objects with bookingid
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Response Body: Array of objects [{bookingid: N}, ...]

column7:
1. Perform GET /booking to get an ID
2. URL: /booking/{{id}}
3. Headers: Accept: application/json
4. Send
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Body matching schema: firstname, lastname, etc.

column4: PUT request with full updated payload
column8:
Status Code: 200 OK
Response Body shows updated values

Status Code: 200 OK
Body shows updated firstname, others remain same

Status Code: 403 Forbidden
Response Body: Forbidden

Status Code: 201 Created

column5: Internal Server Error or Bad Request
column8: Status Code: 500 Internal Server Error (Default API response for bad payload schema)
